revision.comment: Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
revision.text:
[[Category]] [[Category-11]]
{{draft categories| [[Category:year categories]]
[[Category:New-Category]] }} [[Category:Categories with 1 members]]
[[en:Category:7th century by country]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:7世紀の各国]] [[ar:Category:القرن 7 حسب البلد]] [[az:Category:VII əsrdə ölkələr]] [[bn:Category:দেশ অনুযায়ী ৭ম শতাব্দী]] [[bs:Category:7. vijek po državama]] [[commons:Category:7th century by country]] [[cy:Category:7fed ganrif yn ôl gwlad]] [[el:Category:7ος αιώνας ανά χώρα]] [[eo:Category:7-a jarcento laŭ landoj]] [[es:Category:Países en el siglo VII]] [[eu:Category:VII. mendea herrialdearen arabera]] [[fa:Category:سده ۷ (میلادی) بر پایه کشور]] [[fr:Category:VIIe siècle par pays]] [[hy:Category:7-րդ դար ըստ երկրի]] [[id:Category:Abad ke-7 menurut negara]] [[ko:Category:나라별 7세기]] [[ku:Category:Sedsala 7an li gorî welatan]] [[mk:Category:7 век по земја]] [[pt:Category:Século VII por país]] [[ro:Category:Secolul al VII-lea după țară]] [[ru:Category:VII век по странам]] [[sl:Category:7. stoletje po državah]] [[sr:Category:Државе у 7. веку]] [[sv:Category:600-talet efter land]] [[tr:Category:Ülkelere göre 7. yüzyıl]] [[uk:Category:VII століття за країною]] [[ur:Category:ساتویں صدی بلحاظ ملک]] [[vi:Category:Thế kỷ 7 theo quốc gia]] [[zh:Category:7世紀各國]]

revision.comment: 5 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:Category:7世紀の各国 up to rev 82742916
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:7世紀の各国]] to [[Category:7th century by country]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
Bot: restore translated version

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Year categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "[[:en:Category|Category]]" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:Category:" to "[[en:Category:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:Category:Category:" to "[[ja:Category:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6521848)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:New-Category]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
